name: Easy to Make Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Gradually mix in the sifted flour, melted chocolate, and chopped nuts.
5. Grease a 9 x 12-inch baking pan with butter or oil.
6. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 25 minutes at 325°F (163°C).
8. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting and serving.
These will be soft and chewy.
